changes.text: Added artist and album lookup functionality to the player
Artist and album lookup functionality now shows popular tracks and albums
Added rate limiting to the player to prevent abuse... like people duplicating the tab to create multiple instances (looking at you freshmen...))
Added artist and album lookup functionality to the player
Artist and album lookup functionality now shows popular tracks and albums
Added rate limiting to the player to prevent abuse (like people duplicating the tab to create multiple instances (looking at you freshmen...))
Fixed an issue where album art would not display
Reduced the price of a custom playlist from 700 digipogs to 300 digipogs
Reduced the price of adding a song to a custom playlist from 100 digipogs to 50 digipogs
Reduced the price of playing a custom playlist from 250 digipogs to 100 digipogs
Custom playlists are now available! You can create your own playlist for 700 digipogs and add 5 songs for free. After purchasing, you can add or remove additional songs for 50 digipogs each.
Skip box has been removed.
Fixed an issue where playlists wouldn't be able to be purchased
Skip Activity Box: A new widget in the bottom bar displays recent skip activity, showing who skipped what and when. Now you can see all the latest skips happening in real-time!
Skip Activity box now stores skip history in the database so it persists when users rejoin
Skip Activity box is now wider and displays more clearly in the bottom bar
Skip events now track whether they were song skips or shield-blocked attempts
Added a Clear Queue History feature to clear your queue history
Fixed a bug where the leaderboard discount wasn't applying correctly
Fixed the issue with the queue metadata not updating and pulling old songs with the wrong name and wrong skip shield count
When queueing a song, it might queue Poo Bum Poo Bum 4. We are working on a fix for this.
Brand new player UI with redesigned circular control buttons
Playlists are now available directly in the player sidebar
Skip Shields now work on the currently playing track
Buttons are disabled when no song is playing to prevent errors
Leaderboard now has a rolling 7-day reset meaning songs played within the last seven days are what is tracked
Your recently queued songs are now shown when you don't have anything searched in the text box (be careful with this one it can show songs that were queued as anonymous)
The leaderboard now only shows people who have used Jukebar for that week, rather than all the users who have accounts
Skip Shields can now be purchased in bulk up to 1000 which is also the max limit on a song too
Emojis have been replaced with the proper Skip Shield icon
Ban votes now automatically remove the song from the queue and skip it if it is currently playing
Leaderboard now automatically resets when the countdown timer hits 0
Added vote banning which allows users to start a ban on a song the class collectively hates. At least 5 users must be online for it to start and it costs 500 digipogs to start
Added a progress bar that displays the current playback progress of the song
Fixed duplicate song metadata issues (added by names, shield targeting)
Fixed progress bar initialization and sync issues
Fixed server stability issues with Spotify API timeouts
Fixed ban vote system bugs (result notifications, timer expiration, user participation)
Fixed queue metadata cleanup when songs finish playing
Skip Shields now available for purchase at 75 Digipogs (price increased to account for balance)
Skip price increased to 100 Digipogs
Fixed transaction history showing incorrect reason for skip shield purchases
Anonymous mode no longer contributes to leaderboard count
Synchronization improvements to the queue and minor bug fixes
Added skip shields! Users can now add a shield to any song in the queue or the currently playing song to prevent it from being skipped by others. One shield blocks one skip.
Improved the “currently playing” section to match the same style and information display as the queue.
The currently playing section now displays the track length and the remaining time.
Updated the payment system to reflect new pricing for skips (now 75 Digipogs, previously 125) and skip shields (25 Digipogs).
Anonymous mode added to hide your name from the public queue display (Teachers can still see who added the song)
Improved the queue to better show the correct length of the queue
Users can see who added a song so now you can publicly shame your friends for adding horrible songs!
